controls.control_objective: To ensure give investors of various classes access to exposures which they otherwise might be unable to access directly
controls.control_description:
44
<image>
Introduction
Securitisation involves transactions where credit risk in assets are redistributed by
repackaging them into tradeable securities with different risk profiles which may give
investors of various classes access to exposures which they otherwise might be
unable to access directly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give investors of various classes access to exposures which they otherwise might be unable to access directly

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - securitisation transactions) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Securitisation Transactions) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - securitisation transactions) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day these are placed on the
official website of the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as an 'aifi') viz
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to All India Financial Institutions
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI') viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as an 'aifi') viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure the unlikelihood of an entity being subjected to voluntary or involuntary bankruptcy proceedings, including by the originator or the creditors to the
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of these directions, the following definitions apply:
<image>
(1) "bankruptcy remote" means the unlikelihood of an entity being subjected to
voluntary or involuntary bankruptcy proceedings, including by the originator or
the creditors to the originator;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the unlikelihood of an entity being subjected to voluntary or involuntary bankruptcy proceedings, including by the originator or the creditors to the

controls.control_objective: To ensure an option that permits the originator to call the underlying exposures or the securitisation exposures when the outstanding value of the underlying ex
controls.control_description:
(2) "clean-up call" means an option that permits the originator to call the
underlying exposures or the securitisation exposures when the outstanding
value of the underlying exposures falls below a pre-defined threshold, thereby
extinguishing the remaining securitisation exposures of all parties;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an option that permits the originator to call the underlying exposures or the securitisation exposures when the outstanding value of the underlying ex

controls.control_objective: To ensure a contractual arrangement in which an entity mitigates the credit risk associated with a securitisation exposure and, in substance, provides some degr
controls.control_description:
(3) "credit enhancement" means a contractual arrangement in which an entity
mitigates the credit risk associated with a securitisation exposure and, in
substance, provides some degree of added protection to other parties to the
transaction so as to mitigate the credit risk of their securitisation exposures;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a contractual arrangement in which an entity mitigates the credit risk associated with a securitisation exposure and, in substance, provides some degr

controls.control_objective: To ensure a mechanism that, once triggered, accelerates the reduction of the investor's interest in underlying exposures of a securitisation structure and allow
controls.control_description:
(4) "early amortisation provision" means a mechanism that, once triggered,
accelerates the reduction of the investor's interest in underlying exposures of
a securitisation structure and allows investors to be paid out prior to the
originally stated maturity of the securitisation notes issued;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a mechanism that, once triggered, accelerates the reduction of the investor's interest in underlying exposures of a securitisation structure and allow

controls.control_objective: To ensure the difference between the gross finance charge collections and other income received by the special purpose entity (spe), and securitisation notes in
controls.control_description:
(5) "excess spread (or future margin income)" means the difference between the
gross finance charge collections and other income received by the special
purpose entity (SPE), and securitisation notes interest, servicing fees, charge-
offs, and other senior SPE expenses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the difference between the gross finance charge collections and other income received by the special purpose entity (spe), and securitisation notes in

controls.control_objective: To ensure the sum of the on- balance sheet amount of the exposure, or carrying value - which takes into account purchase discounts and writedowns/specific provisions the aifi took on this securitisation exposure - and the off-balance sheet exposure amount
controls.control_description:
(6) "exposure amount" of a securitisation exposure means the sum of the on-
balance sheet amount of the exposure, or carrying value - which takes into
account purchase discounts and writedowns/specific provisions the AIFI took
on this securitisation exposure - and the off-balance sheet exposure amount,
where applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the sum of the on- balance sheet amount of the exposure, or carrying value - which takes into account purchase discounts and writedowns/specific provisions the aifi took on this securitisation exposure - and the off-balance sheet exposure amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure the first level of financial support provided by the originator or a third party to improve the creditworthiness of the securitisation notes issued by
controls.control_description:
(7) "first loss facility" means the first level of financial support provided by the
originator or a third party to improve the creditworthiness of the securitisation
notes issued by the SPE such that the provider of the facility bears the part or
all of the risks associated with the assets held by the SPE;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the first level of financial support provided by the originator or a third party to improve the creditworthiness of the securitisation notes issued by

controls.control_objective: To ensure the protection arising when an aifi provides support to a securitisation in excess of its predetermined contractual obligation
controls.control_description:
(8) "implicit support" means the protection arising when an AIFI provides support
to a securitisation in excess of its predetermined contractual obligation;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the protection arising when an aifi provides support to a securitisation in excess of its predetermined contractual obligation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the same lender which had initially sanctioned one or more of the exposures underlying a securitisation transaction since loans purchased from lend
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Originator may not be the same lender which had initially
sanctioned one or more of the exposures underlying a securitisation
transaction since loans purchased from lenders can also be sold to SPEs for
the purpose of securitisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the same lender which had initially sanctioned one or more of the exposures underlying a securitisation transaction since loans purchased from lend

controls.control_objective: To ensure any form of credit enhancement by virtue of which underlying exposures are posted in value which is higher than the value of the securitisation notes
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any form of credit enhancement by virtue of which underlying exposures are posted in value which is higher than the value of the securitisation notes

controls.control_objective: To ensure the process of using the cash flows from the securitised assets to acquire more assets in the manner disclosed upfront in the prospectus of the scheme
controls.control_description:
(14) "replenishment" means the process of using the cash flows from the
securitised assets to acquire more assets in the manner disclosed upfront in
the prospectus of the scheme, which will continue for a pre-announced
replenishment period, following which the securitisation structure switches to
an amortising one;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the process of using the cash flows from the securitised assets to acquire more assets in the manner disclosed upfront in the prospectus of the scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be treated as securitisation exposures
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Reserve accounts, such as cash collateral accounts, which is
earmarked to absorb credit losses arising from the securitisation and is
recorded as an asset by the originator must also be treated as securitisation
exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be treated as securitisation exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure a tranche which is effectively backed or secured by a first claim on the entire amount of the assets in the underlying securitised pool
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a tranche which is effectively backed or secured by a first claim on the entire amount of the assets in the underlying securitised pool

controls.control_objective: To ensure where all tranches above the first-loss piece are rated, the most highly rated position would be treated as a senior tranche
controls.control_description:
Provided that where all tranches above the first-loss piece are rated, the most
highly rated position would be treated as a senior tranche.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to where all tranches above the first-loss piece are rated, the most highly rated position would be treated as a senior tranche

controls.control_objective: To ensure when there are several tranches that share the same rating, only the most senior tranche in the cash flow waterfall would be treated as senior (unless
controls.control_description:
Provided that when there are several tranches that share the same rating,
only the most senior tranche in the cash flow waterfall would be treated as
senior (unless the only difference among them is the effective maturity).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to when there are several tranches that share the same rating, only the most senior tranche in the cash flow waterfall would be treated as senior (unless

controls.control_objective: To ensure when the different ratings of several senior tranches only result from a difference in maturity, all of these tranches should be treated as senior tra
controls.control_description:
Provided that when the different ratings of several senior tranches only result
from a difference in maturity, all of these tranches should be treated as senior
tranches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to when the different ratings of several senior tranches only result from a difference in maturity, all of these tranches should be treated as senior tra

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company, trust or other entity organised for a specific purpose, the activities of which are limited to those appropriate to accomplish the purpose
controls.control_description:
(23) "special purpose entity (SPE)" means a company, trust or other entity
organised for a specific purpose, the activities of which are limited to those
appropriate to accomplish the purpose of the SPE, and the structure of which
is intended to isolate the SPE from the credit risk of an originator;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company, trust or other entity organised for a specific purpose, the activities of which are limited to those appropriate to accomplish the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure any tranche that is junior to the senior tranche(s)
controls.control_description:
(24) "subordinate tranche" means any tranche that is junior to the senior
tranche(s);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any tranche that is junior to the senior tranche(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure a structure where credit risk of an underlying pool of exposures is transferred, in whole or in part, through the use of credit derivatives or credit
controls.control_description:
(25) "synthetic securitisation" means a structure where credit risk of an
underlying pool of exposures is transferred, in whole or in part, through the
use of credit derivatives or credit guarantees that serve to hedge the credit
risk of the portfolio which remains on the balance sheet of the AIFI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a structure where credit risk of an underlying pool of exposures is transferred, in whole or in part, through the use of credit derivatives or credit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as tranches
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Securitisation notes issued by the SPE and credit enhancement
facilities available shall be treated as tranches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as tranches

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake the securitisation activities or assume securitisation exposures as mentioned below: (1) re-securitisation exposures
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake the securitisation activities or assume securitisation exposures as mentioned below: (1) re-securitisation exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for securitisation
controls.control_description:
Provided that loans with tenor up to 24 months extended to individuals
for agricultural activities (as described in Reserve Bank of India (Priority
Sector Lending - Targets and Classification) Directions, 2025) where
both interest and principal are due only on maturity and trade
receivables with tenor up to 12 months discounted/purchased by AIFIs
from their borrowers shall be eligible for securitisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for securitisation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be able to verify the compliance of the underlying asset with the above requirement
controls.control_description:
In case
such assets are securitised, the investors in the securitisation notes
<image>
issued against them should be able to verify the compliance of the
underlying asset with the above requirement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be able to verify the compliance of the underlying asset with the above requirement

controls.control_objective: To ensure have satisfied the minimum holding period (mhp) requirement as defined in reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - transfer and distr
controls.control_description:
The originators of such exposures shall have satisfied the Minimum holding
period (MHP) requirement as defined in Reserve Bank of India (All India
Financial Institutions - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have satisfied the minimum holding period (mhp) requirement as defined in reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - transfer and distr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be counted from the date of full disbursement of the loan, or registration of security interest with central registry of securitisation asset reconstr
controls.control_description:
Provided that for commercial or residential real estate mortgages, MHP shall be
counted from the date of full disbursement of the loan, or registration of security
interest with Central Registry of Securitisation Asset Reconstruction and
Security Interest of India (CERSAI), whichever is later.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be counted from the date of full disbursement of the loan, or registration of security interest with central registry of securitisation asset reconstr

controls.control_objective: To ensure contravene the rights of underlying obligors
controls.control_description:
The transactions undertaken in terms of these directions must not contravene
the rights of underlying obligors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contravene the rights of underlying obligors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in the contract between originator and servicing agent and all necessary consent from obligors (including from third parties)
controls.control_description:
To ensure compliance with this stipulation,
enabling clauses must be included in the contract between originator and
servicing agent and all necessary consent from obligors (including from third
parties), where necessary as per the respective contracts, should have been
obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in the contract between originator and servicing agent and all necessary consent from obligors (including from third parties)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 5 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised
controls.control_description:
The originators should
adhere to the MRR as detailed below while securitising loans leading to
issuance of securitisation notes, other than for residential mortgage backed
securities:
(1) For underlying loans with original maturity of 24 months or less, the MRR shall
be 5 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 5 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 10 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) For underlying loans with original maturity of more than 24 months as well as
loans with bullet repayments, as mentioned in proviso to Paragraph 5, the
MRR shall be 10 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 10 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 5 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised, irrespective of the original maturity
controls.control_description:
In the case of residential mortgage backed securities, the MRR for the
originator shall be 5 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised,
irrespective of the original maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 5 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised, irrespective of the original maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure include overcollateralization available
controls.control_description:
The MRR shall be retained by the originator as follows:
(1) Up to 5 per cent of the book value of loans being securitised:
Explanation: It is clarified that first loss facility for this purpose shall not
include overcollateralization available, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include overcollateralization available

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reduced either through hedging of credit risk or selling or encumbering the retained interest
controls.control_description:
MRR should not be reduced either through hedging of credit risk or selling or
encumbering the retained interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reduced either through hedging of credit risk or selling or encumbering the retained interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure change during the life of securitisation
controls.control_description:
The form of MRR should not change during the life of
securitisation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to change during the life of securitisation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained on an ongoing basis except for reduction of retained exposure due to repayment or through the absorption of losses
controls.control_description:
(2) The MRR as a percentage of unamortised principal should be maintained on
an ongoing basis except for reduction of retained exposure due to repayment
or through the absorption of losses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained on an ongoing basis except for reduction of retained exposure due to repayment or through the absorption of losses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained not only at the initiation of the securitisation but also at the end of the replenishment period
controls.control_description:
Specifically, in cases of securitisations
<image>
featuring replenishment period, MRR should be maintained not only at the
initiation of the securitisation but also at the end of the replenishment period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained not only at the initiation of the securitisation but also at the end of the replenishment period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less stringent than those applied to exposures retained on the balance sheet of the originator
controls.control_description:
Underwriting standards for exposures securitised should not be less stringent
than those applied to exposures retained on the balance sheet of the originator.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less stringent than those applied to exposures retained on the balance sheet of the originator

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to the entities having securitisation exposures the timing and purpose of such changes
controls.control_description:
Where underwriting standards change between the loan origination and till all
the claims associated with securitised note are paid-off, the originator should
disclose to the entities having securitisation exposures the timing and purpose
of such changes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to the entities having securitisation exposures the timing and purpose of such changes

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the standards of due diligence process adopted by the originator which may include verification of sufficiency and consistency of loan origin
controls.control_description:
In cases of securitisation of exposures purchased by originator from other
lenders, the requirements applicable for underwriting standards shall apply to
the standards of due diligence process adopted by the originator which may
include verification of sufficiency and consistency of loan origination process of
the lender from whom the exposures were purchased by the originator.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the standards of due diligence process adopted by the originator which may include verification of sufficiency and consistency of loan origin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly defined at the time of securitisation and appropriate legal comfort regarding their enforceability should be provided
controls.control_description:
To prevent investors being subjected to unexpected repayment profiles during
the life of a securitisation, the priorities of payments for all liabilities in all
circumstances should be clearly defined at the time of securitisation and
appropriate legal comfort regarding their enforceability should be provided.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly defined at the time of securitisation and appropriate legal comfort regarding their enforceability should be provided

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly and fully disclosed in offer documents and in investor reports, with information in the investor report that clearly identifies the breach
controls.control_description:
To help provide investors with full transparency over any changes to the cash
flow waterfall, payment profile or priority of payments that might affect a
securitisation, all triggers affecting the cash flow waterfall, payment profile or
priority of payments of the securitisation should be clearly and fully disclosed in
offer documents and in investor reports, with information in the investor report
that clearly identifies the breach status in respect of expected cash flows to the
note holders, the ability for the breach to be reversed and the consequences of
the breach.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be clearly and fully disclosed in offer documents and in investor reports, with information in the investor report that clearly identifies the breach

controls.control_objective: To ensure include provisions for appropriate early amortisation events and/or triggers of termination of the replenishment period, including, notably: (1) deter
controls.control_description:
Securitisations featuring a replenishment period should include provisions for
appropriate early amortisation events and/or triggers of termination of the
replenishment period, including, notably:
(1) deterioration in the credit quality of the underlying exposures;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include provisions for appropriate early amortisation events and/or triggers of termination of the replenishment period, including, notably: (1) deter

controls.control_objective: To ensure in this framework, result in material alteration of the risk profile of the securitisation notes at any point, the originator shall ensure that same i
controls.control_description:
In the event actions of associated institutional stakeholders (originator, SPE,
servicing agent, credit enhancement provider and others) that are not prohibited
in this framework, result in material alteration of the risk profile of the
securitisation notes at any point, the originator shall ensure that same is
adequately informed and disclosed to investors, credit rating agencies and
other service providers within a maximum time frame of 14 calendar days.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to in this framework, result in material alteration of the risk profile of the securitisation notes at any point, the originator shall ensure that same i

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 20 per cent of the total securitisation exposures created by such structure or scheme
controls.control_description:
The total exposure of an originator to the securitisation exposures belonging to
a particular securitisation structure or scheme should not exceed 20 per cent of
the total securitisation exposures created by such structure or scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 20 per cent of the total securitisation exposures created by such structure or scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded from this limit
controls.control_description:
However, the exposure of originators to credit enhancing interest only strip shall
be excluded from this limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be excluded from this limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹ 1 crore
controls.control_description: The minimum ticket size for issuance of securitisation notes shall be ₹ 1 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹ 1 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the following criteria to enable the originator to apply the guidelines on capital adequacy and other aspects as prescribed in these directions w
controls.control_description:
The SPE should meet the following criteria to enable the originator to apply the
guidelines on capital adequacy and other aspects as prescribed in these
directions with regard to the securitisation exposures assumed by it:
(1) Any transaction between the originator and the SPE should be strictly on
arm's length basis.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to meet the following criteria to enable the originator to apply the guidelines on capital adequacy and other aspects as prescribed in these directions w

controls.control_objective: To ensure resemble in name or imply any connection or relationship with the originator of the assets in its title or name
controls.control_description:
(2) The SPE and the trustee should not resemble in name or imply any
connection or relationship with the originator of the assets in its title or name.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to resemble in name or imply any connection or relationship with the originator of the assets in its title or name

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any ownership, proprietary or beneficial interest in the spe except those specifically permitted under these directions
controls.control_description:
(3) The originator should not have any ownership, proprietary or beneficial
interest in the SPE except those specifically permitted under these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any ownership, proprietary or beneficial interest in the spe except those specifically permitted under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold any share capital in the spe
controls.control_description: The originator shall not hold any share capital in the SPE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold any share capital in the spe

controls.control_objective: To ensure have more than one representative, without veto power, on the board of the spe provided the board has at least four members and independent directors
controls.control_description:
(4) The originator should not have more than one representative, without veto
power, on the board of the SPE provided the board has at least four members
and independent directors are in majority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have more than one representative, without veto power, on the board of the spe provided the board has at least four members and independent directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the trust deed
controls.control_description:
(i) The originator should not exercise control, directly or indirectly, over the
SPE and the trustees, and shall not settle the trust deed, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle the trust deed

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any ownership, proprietary or beneficial interest in the trustees
controls.control_description:
(ii) The originator shall not have any ownership, proprietary or beneficial
interest in the trustees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any ownership, proprietary or beneficial interest in the trustees

controls.control_objective: To ensure be bankruptcy remote and non-discretionary
controls.control_description: (iii) The SPE should be bankruptcy remote and non-discretionary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be bankruptcy remote and non-discretionary

controls.control_objective: To ensure lay down, in detail, the functions to be performed by the trustee, their rights and obligations as well as the rights and obligations of the investors
controls.control_description:
(iv) The trust deed, if any, should lay down, in detail, the functions to be
performed by the trustee, their rights and obligations as well as the rights
and obligations of the investors in relation to the securitised assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lay down, in detail, the functions to be performed by the trustee, their rights and obligations as well as the rights and obligations of the investors

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for any discretion to the trustee as to the manner of disposal and management or application of the trust property
controls.control_description:
The
trust deed should not provide for any discretion to the trustee as to the
manner of disposal and management or application of the trust property.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for any discretion to the trustee as to the manner of disposal and management or application of the trust property

controls.control_objective: To ensure be empowered in the trust deed to change the trustee at any point of time
controls.control_description:
In order to protect their interests, investors should be empowered in the
trust deed to change the trustee at any point of time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be empowered in the trust deed to change the trustee at any point of time

controls.control_objective: To ensure only perform trusteeship functions in relation to the spe and should not undertake any other business with the spe
controls.control_description:
(v) The trustee should only perform trusteeship functions in relation to the
SPE and should not undertake any other business with the SPE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only perform trusteeship functions in relation to the spe and should not undertake any other business with the spe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available by the originator and/or other lenders, to the rbi
controls.control_description:
(vi) A copy of the trust deed, if any, and the accounts and statement of affairs
of the SPE should be made available by the originator and/or other
lenders, to the RBI, if required to do so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available by the originator and/or other lenders, to the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure support the losses of the spe except under the facilities explicitly permitted under these directions and shall also not be liable to meet the recurri
controls.control_description:
(6) The originator shall not support the losses of the SPE except under the
facilities explicitly permitted under these directions and shall also not be liable
to meet the recurring expenses of the SPE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to support the losses of the spe except under the facilities explicitly permitted under these directions and shall also not be liable to meet the recurri

controls.control_objective: To ensure make it clear to the investors in the securitization notes issued by it that these securitisation notes are not insured and do not represent deposit l
controls.control_description:
(7) The SPE should make it clear to the investors in the securitization notes
issued by it that these securitisation notes are not insured and do not
represent deposit liabilities of the originator, servicer or trustees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make it clear to the investors in the securitization notes issued by it that these securitisation notes are not insured and do not represent deposit l

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the lender from whom the originator has purchased the exposures, as well
controls.control_description:
In cases where the originator has purchased loans from another lender, the
provisions of Paragraph 28 shall apply to the lender from whom the originator
has purchased the exposures, as well.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the lender from whom the originator has purchased the exposures, as well

controls.control_objective: To ensure for the purpose of sub-paragraph (4) of paragraph 28, only one of either the originator or the lender from whom loans were purchased by the originator
controls.control_description:
Provided that for the purpose of sub-paragraph (4) of Paragraph 28, only one of
either the originator or the lender from whom loans were purchased by the
originator, may have the representative on the board of the SPE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to for the purpose of sub-paragraph (4) of paragraph 28, only one of either the originator or the lender from whom loans were purchased by the originator

controls.control_objective: To ensure make representations and warranties concerning those assets
controls.control_description:
An originator that sells assets to SPE may make representations and
warranties concerning those assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make representations and warranties concerning those assets
